nasb.text: The boundary shall extend from the sea to Hazar-enan at the border of Damascus, and on the north toward the north is the border of Hamath. This is the north side.

esv.text: So the boundary shall run from the sea to Hazar-enan, which is on the northern border of Damascus, with the border of Hamath to the north. This shall be the north side.

cnv.text: 這邊界從海到哈薩．以難，北邊有大馬士革的邊界，再北有哈馬的邊界。這是北面的地界。

ccb.text: 这样，北界是从地中海岸一直到大马士革边界的哈撒·以难，以哈马为界。
